The '''Dorr Farm''' was a [[Moisture farm/Legends|moisture farm]] located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and owned by [[Sholh Dorr]].

Before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]] [[Bantha Poodoo/Legends|poodoo]] was found covering perimeter sensors on the Dorr Farm.<ref name="SWEIIAotCN" /> [[Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|Shmi Skywalker Lars]] wrote in her [[Holojournal/Legends|holojournal]] that with the growing numbers of [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]] getting closer to the land near the [[Lars homestead/Legends|Lars homestead]], [[Cliegg Lars/Legends|Cliegg Lars]] was going to start to organize with other farmers at the Dorr Farm.<ref name="TG">''[[Tatooine Ghost]]''</ref> When Cliegg left with his son [[Owen Lars/Legends|Owen]] in the morning on their way to the Dorr's farm, they found Shmi's footprints among those of Tuskens, as she had been captured collecting [[Mushroom/Legends|mushrooms]].<ref name="SWEIIAotCN" />
